description: Learned how JavaScript handles asynchronous operations using the call stack, callback queue, and event loop.
Practiced creating modern glassmorphism effects using backdrop-filter, transparency, and glow shadows.
Built a basic HTTP server using vanilla Node.js and learned how routing works without Express.
Understood semantic tags like header, main, section, article, and footer for better structure and accessibility.
Learned how to initialize git, commit changes, and push projects to GitHub repositories.
Practiced building responsive layouts using flexbox, CSS grid, and media queries.
Learned how to manage component state using the useState hook and update UI dynamically.
Explored REST architecture and learned how GET, POST, PUT, and DELETE requests work.
Practiced inserting, updating, deleting, and fetching documents using MongoDB queries.
Solved multiple binary search problems and understood time complexity optimization.
Learning how to write backend in nodejs.
